tools.name: search_movies
tools.description: Search the Blu-ray movie database by title, director, actor, or keywords.

tools.name: get_movie_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific movie including cast, trailer, and external links.

tools.name: get_featured_movies
tools.description: Get the currently featured and recommended Blu-ray movies.

tools.name: browse_by_tag
tools.description: Browse Blu-ray movies by category/tag (e.g. "weihnachtsfilme", "action", "klassiker"). Use list_tags to discover available tags.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all available movie categories/tags with the number of movies in each. Use the returned slugs with browse_by_tag.

tools.name: get_similar_movies
tools.description: Get movies that are similar or related to a specific movie (e.g. same series, same theme).

tools.name: browse_movies
tools.description: Browse Blu-ray movies filtered by release year (exact or range) and/or genre. At least one filter is required.
